productDisplayName: CASIO Baby-G Women Analogue & Digital Watch BX007
description: Case style: Analogue and digital watch with resin case and stainless steel circular black base Dial style: Black dial, has abstract display of hour marks, circular digital display near the eight-hour mark, and branding at the twelve-hour mark Features: Alarm, stopwatch, countdown timer, world time, backlight LED, and buttons to reset the time Strap style: Black, shock-resistant, resin strap secured with a tang clasp Water resistance up to 100 metresComes in a signature CASIO case Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
